name: Kale & Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the smoked garlic sausage until fully cooked and slice it.
2. Peel and chop the potatoes.
3. Combine the vegetable oil and water in a pot.
4. Add the potatoes to the pot with the oil and water mixture.
5. Cook for 20 to 30 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
6. Remove the potatoes, reserving the liquid.
7. Mash the potatoes through a sieve and return them to the potato liquid.
8. Add salt and pepper, then simmer for 20 minutes.
9. Wash the kale and discard any tough leaves; cut into shreds.
10. Add the shredded kale to the potatoes and cook for an additional 25 minutes.
11. Add the cooked sausage and gently simmer for 5 more minutes.
